title: Wizarding World Harry Potter, Bitzee Interactive Toy with 20 Characters Inside, Reacts to Swipes, Tilts & Taps, Digital Pet Kids Toys for Girls & Boys
features: Digital friends you can interact with: Interact with Harry Potter characters like never before with Bitzee. The Hogwarts pod responds to touch, movement, swipes & tilts with interactions & sounds. Includes 3 AA batteries

20 characters in 1 pod: The more you play, the more you’ll unlock. Each character arrives on Hogwarts Express, just like the movies. Fill the cauldron meter to collect Harry, Hermione, Ron, Hedwig, Dobby & more

Enchanting film moments: Discover each character’s movie moment – Harry playing Quidditch, Hermione mixing Polyjuice, Ron playing Wizard’s Chess & more, plus unlock 4 iconic events like the holidays at Hogwarts
So many ways to play: Wave to cast spells, fulfill character tasks, play 9 mini kids games to reveal objects like the Sorting Hat & unlock the Bitzee super game
Includes: 1 Bitzee, 1 Quick Start Guide, 1 Instruction Sheet, 3 AA Batteries
Harry Potter gifts & toys for kids: Bitzee is a fun, screen-free alternative to a handheld game console & video games. Discover Spin Master’s Harry Potter toys & games, wands, dolls & accessories
